column2: CAA Case Officer - Incomplete OA Pack
column3: ["The CAA case officer accesses the applicant's operational authorisation (OA) pack. ", 'The CAA case officer reviews the OA pack according to the compliance checklist. ', 'The CAA case officer finds that the OA pack is incomplete. ', 'A note from the applicant explaining they will provide the missing information later is present. ', 'The CAA case officer cannot open a valid case until all required information is provided. ']
column4: ['The CAA case officer is able to view and interact with the OA pack. ', 'The CAA case officer confirms that they have reviewed the OA pack based on the provided compliance checklist. ', 'The CAA case officer identifies missing information within the OA pack as compared to the requirements of the compliance checklist. ', "There's a clear and concise note from the applicant stating that they will supply the required missing information at a later time. ", 'The CAA case officer is unable to create or initiate a new case as long as there are still missing pieces of information in the OA pack. ']
